name: current-2026-role-v3-tail-guarded
description: Full 2026 replay testing whether the existing no-future learned-tail residual correction can safely improve Strong RoleV3 score means instead of only adjusting win probabilities.
modelNames: No-Future Strong RoleV3 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=75 C=35
No-Future TailGuarded Strong RoleV3 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=75 C=35 TW=0.20 TL=50 TN=32 TC=20 F=PR G=8/R4/F20
No-Future TailGuarded Strong RoleV3 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=75 C=35 TW=0.35 TL=40 TN=24 TC=25 F=PR G=8/R4/F20
No-Future RoleV3 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=55 C=35
No-Future Strong RoleV2 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=70 C=35
notes: TailGuarded variants apply the learned tail correction to expected scores, unlike TailRiskWinProb.
Both variants share the Strong RoleV3 simulation seed so score differences come from the correction, not Monte Carlo randomness.
